footer.tagline: Custom furniture manufacturer. Designed and built in Vlorë — delivered worldwide.
footer.copyright: The M Concept. All rights reserved.

home.statementMain: We design and manufacture premium custom furniture for residential, hospitality, and commercial spaces —

craft.heading:
Furniture
with a soul.
craft.body1: The M Concept was built on a single conviction: furniture should outlast trends, survive generations, and improve with age. We work exclusively with premium hardwoods and natural stone, shaped by craftsmen who care deeply about every joint, every surface, every detail.
craft.body2: Every piece is designed in Vlorë and produced entirely in our own facilities — no outsourcing, no compromise on quality, no two pieces exactly alike.

facility.body: Our Vlorë facility is equipped with advanced woodworking machinery — CNC machining, precision joinery, finishing rooms — operated by a dedicated team of skilled craftsmen.

cta.heading: Have a project in mind?
cta.body: Whether it's a single statement piece or a full-building fit-out, our team works with you from initial brief to final installation.

meta.title: Our Story
meta.description: Founded in 2000, The M Concept has grown from a small workshop in Vlorë into Albania's leading custom furniture manufacturer.

hero.heading: Our Story
hero.subheading: Twenty-five years of craft, conviction, and furniture built to outlast trends.

company.statementMain: Founded on a conviction — that a piece of furniture should tell the story of the hands that made it, and stand

founding.body1: In 2000, a small woodworking workshop opened on the edge of Vlorë with a simple ambition: to make furniture worth making. No assembly. No shortcuts. Just wood, skill, and an obsessive eye for detail.
founding.body2: The early years were defined by word of mouth. Hoteliers along the Albanian Riviera started to notice — a bedroom that felt different, a wardrobe that closed exactly, a reception table that commanded attention. Orders grew. So did the team.
founding.body3: By the mid-2000s we had outgrown the original space. By the 2010s we had built a production facility equipped for serious scale — without ever losing the precision of the workshop where everything began.

milestones.title: The Beginning
milestones.body: Founded in a small workshop on the outskirts of Vlorë, The M Concept started with a lathe, a handful of tools, and an uncompromising belief that furniture should be built to last.

milestones.title: First Major Contract
milestones.body: Our first large-scale hospitality commission — a full bedroom fit-out for a coastal resort — set the standard for what we would become: a trusted partner for demanding projects.

milestones.title: New Factory
milestones.body: Demand outgrew the original workshop. We moved into a purpose-built production facility in Vlorë, equipped with CNC machinery and dedicated rooms — retaining every craftsman on staff.

milestones.title: Fleet Expansion
milestones.body: We brought delivery and installation in-house, adding our own branded vehicles. From the factory floor to your space — every step under our control.

milestones.title: The M Concept Brand
milestones.body: After two decades of quietly building a reputation, we unified our identity under The M Concept — a name that stands for precision, craft, and an unrelenting pursuit of quality.

milestones.title: Today
milestones.body: Today we serve hotels, residences, and commercial clients across the region, producing every piece entirely in-house — no outsourcing, no shortcuts, no two pieces exactly alike.

facility.body1: Our Vlorë facility spans 2,500 m² of dedicated production space. CNC machinery, precision joinery, lacquering rooms and upholstery — all under one roof, all operated by craftsmen who have been with us for years.
facility.body2: We do not subcontract. The piece that leaves our floor is the piece our team designed, cut, finished, and approved. That's the only way to guarantee what we guarantee.

items.label: No Outsourcing
items.desc: Every joint, surface, and finish is made under our roof by our team.

items.label: Built to Order
items.desc: Nothing is produced speculatively. Every piece is commissioned, designed, and manufactured for a specific space.

items.label: Premium Materials
items.desc: We work exclusively with certified hardwoods, natural stone, and premium hardware — sourced for longevity.

items.label: Delivered Complete
items.desc: We handle production, delivery, and on-site installation — so you receive a finished result, not a flatpack.
